text: Paper accepted at ICLR 2026: Beyond a Million Tokens: Benchmarking and Enhancing Long-Term Memory in LLMs
Paper accepted at WWW 2026: Pathways of Thoughts: Multi-Directional Thinking for Long-form Personalized Question Answering
Awarded the Google PhD Fellowship in Natural Language Processing
Paper accepted at EMNLP 2025: LaMP-QA: A Benchmark for Personalized Long-form Question Answering
Passed PhD Candidacy Examination with Distinction at UMass Amherst
Received the SIGIR 2024 Best Short Paper Award for work on evaluating retrieval quality in RAG
Paper accepted at ACL 2024: LaMP: When Large Language Models Meet Personalization
Received the SIGIR 2023 Best Student Paper Award for knowledge-intensive visual question answering work
Awarded the W. Bruce Croft Graduate Scholarship at UMass Amherst
Paper accepted at EMNLP 2021: ARMAN: Pre-training for Persian Abstractive Summarization
Received Best Thesis Award in Computer Engineering from the University of Tehran
